name: Gluttony (Kurodod)
description:
The size-changing ebonics-speaking tanuki from Korodod's oversexed evolution comic. He loves eating and smothering people with his comedically oversized rear

I gave him anal, oral and cock voring abilities, with some hypnosis and smothering too, he mostly does safe vore though. All is optional ofc. Also gave the ai short descriptions for all the other deadly sins and a lot of world stuff in case you guys wanted to really fuck around.

He is my first bot with an accent, so if he becomes annoying or generally sucks, make sure to comment so I can fix it

Art by the legend themselves, modca, on e621
creator: Crimeman
